title: Goety Revelation with the Honkai Impact
description: Modified some of Goety Revelation's texture models to style Honkai Impact 3rd.
body:
## 关于
这可以算作Goety: Revelation的官方材质包，因为本材质包由团队美术制作。
希望社区积极踊跃分享您的材质包！
## 描述
本材质包修改了部分诡厄巫法启示录的纹理，将其变为了游戏—崩坏三的部分要素。

莱瓦汀—天火大剑
冈格尼尔—湛寂之赫勒尔
天启长弓—往世的飞花
晋升之环—圣痕
## 注意
本材质包使用ARR协议，严禁盗用。
![展示](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc8976ee90dfb88a466e14bd4c683de2fb49214.png)
## About
This counts as the official texture pack for Goety: Revelation, as it was created by the team artists.
We hope that the community will actively share your texture packs.
## Description
This texture pack modifies some of the textures of the Apocalypse of Witchcraft and Witchcraft, turning them into some elements of the game, Honkai Impact III.

Levatin – The Great Sword of Heavenly Fire
Gungnir – Hellel of Silence
Apocalypse Longbow - Flying Flowers of the Past Lives
The Halo—Stigmata
## Warn!
This material pack uses the ARR License and is strictly forbidden to be misappropriated.
![display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc8976ee90dfb88a466e14bd4c683de2fb49214.png)
